name: vitoria-regia-one-server

scripts.build: npm run test:regressions && node --check src/telegram-call-classifier.mjs && node --check src/telegram-callmebot-ssl-hotfix.mjs && node --check src/telegram-concierge-data.mjs && node --check src/telegram-concierge-audio.mjs && node --check src/telegram-concierge-preload.mjs && node --check src/telegram-callmebot-preload.mjs && node --check src/visitor-qr-preload.mjs && node --check src/platform-core.mjs && node --check src/platform-contract.mjs && node --check src/platform-asaas.mjs && node --check src/platform-preload.mjs && node --check src/index.js

description: Backend Vitória Régia One v14 com assinatura, contrato, ASAAS, auditoria e privacidade administrativa.
